syllogism_text: Every single pencil is an item of stationery. There are no stationery items that can be described as food. It is therefore true that some items of food are not pencils.

attempts.code:
% Facts for pencils
pencil(pencil1).

% stationery has no food items
% food has no stationery items
food(food1).

% P1: Every pencil is stationery
stationery(X) :- pencil(X).

% P2: No stationery is food
conflict :- stationery(X), food(X).

% C: Some food are not pencils
valid_syllogism :- food(X), \+ pencil(X).
